expectations.evidence: Provides clean, ready-to-use YAML front matter template with all required fields: title, weight, difficulty, agents, topics, dueDate, description, draft
Shows taxonomy configuration in hugo.yaml at the beginning and explains how difficulty, agent, topic fields map to taxonomies
Clearly shows leaf bundle structure with content/homework/assignment-01/ containing index.md and resource files (starter-code.cpp, rubric.pdf, etc.)
Explains leaf bundles use Hugo .Resources method for template access, shows file organization keeps resources adjacent to index.md
